creator: mmurphy@neboweb.com
text:
Hi,

I would like to suggest www.buildoembetter.com (a division of Bell Micro) to your commercial vendors page (http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/hardware.html).  Build OEM Better is a OEM manufacturer that builds an array of products ranging software appliances to industrial devices that use FreeBSD among other operating systems. 

Please let me know what information you need from me for the listing. Thank you,



Best Regards,
Mallory Murphy
